panel.title: VetSaaS assistant
panel.subtitle: Product help and read-only clinic lookups
panel.welcome: I can help you use VetSaaS or look up clinic data (patients, owners, products, today’s summary).
panel.placeholder: E.g. Where do I record a vaccine? or find patient Luna…
panel.empty_hint: Try: “How many appointments today?” or “How do I open a cash session?”
panel.not_configured: The assistant is not configured yet. OPENAI_API_KEY is missing on the server.
panel.error: I couldn’t reply right now. Please try again in a few seconds.

suggestions.help_caja: How do I open a cash session?
